overview.title: Smart Nest-Style Environmental Thermostat Controller
overview.description: Intelligent wall-mounted environment controller with climate regulation.

requirements: Collect high-precision altitude, pressure, and ambient temperature readings.
Display custom menu, heat indices, and setpoint targets on OLED.
Actuate solid-state heating elements or fan control through an optoisolated relay switch.
Maintain low-power standby during battery backups.
requirements.power_needs: 5V stationary adapter feed. Rechargeable battery backup requires a charger/boost module not represented in this low-voltage wiring preset.
safety_notes: Incorporate thermal fusing if controlling resistive heater elements.
Double check voltage bounds before wiring rechargeable LiPos.

components.name: ESP32 NodeMCU Development Board
components.rationale: Onboard Bluetooth and WiFi allow web setpoints, scheduling, and logging integrations.

components.name: BMP280 Barometric Pressure & Temp Sensor
components.rationale: Performs precision temperature tracking to regulate comfortable setpoints within 0.1C.

components.name: 5V 1-Channel Optocoupled Relay Module
components.rationale: Switches active HVAC furnace control logic safely.

pins.name: Signal Input
pins.description: 3.3V-compatible logic input to trigger optocoupled relay module

pins.name: Switch Normally Open Terminal
pins.description: Connected to COM only when energized

components.name: 0.96 inch OLED Display (I2C)
components.rationale: Renders a real-time UI showing current temp vs user target setpoints.

components.name: 5V Stationary Adapter Feed
components.rationale: Provides regulated 5V input for ESP32 VIN and the relay coil supply.

assembly.title: Wire 5V adapter and low-voltage rails
assembly.description: Seat the ESP32 on your proto-board. Connect PWR1 5V to ESP32 VIN and relay VCC, then tie PWR1 GND to the shared ground rail. Use ESP32 3V3 only for the BMP280 and OLED logic rail.
assembly.danger_message: Do not attach a bare LiPo directly to VIN. Add a proper charger/boost module before implementing battery backup.

assembly.title: Construct Shared I2C Bus
assembly.description: Connect SCL on both OLED and BMP280 to ESP32 Pin D22. Connect SDA on both display and pressure sensor to ESP32 Pin D21. Power them with 3.3V power rails and verify no crosstalk.

assembly.title: Integrate HVAC Switching relay
assembly.description: Power the relay coil from the PWR1 5V rail. Send the 3.3V-compatible input line (IN) to ESP32 GPIO pin D25. Route furnace control lines into Normally Open (NO) and Common (COM) blocks.
assembly.danger_message: Unplug structural heating supplies before hooking up high voltage terminals!

mechanical.mounting_guidance: Screw back-plate onto dry-wall with standard drywall screws. Clip the acrylic cover overlay on top for clean bezel appearance.
fabrication_details: Laser cut clear acrylic viewing window.
Mounting holes spaced 60mm vertically to match US wall standards.

cad_sources.name: Thermostat trim plate STL candidate index
cad_sources.license: Model-specific licenses vary; verify selected model before fabrication
cad_sources.notes: Use as a geometry reference for wall coverage, then generate a project-specific acrylic DXF for the OLED/BMP280 layout.

cad_sources.name: Google Nest thermostat wallmount candidate index
cad_sources.license: Commercial model listing; verify current download price and license before reuse
cad_sources.notes: Useful reference for wall-mount clip geometry and cable pass-through placement.

component_placements.label: ESP32 NodeMCU Development Board
component_placements.notes: Controller centered behind the acrylic cover.

component_placements.label: 0.96 inch OLED Display (I2C)
component_placements.notes: Display is centered in the front viewing window.

component_placements.label: BMP280 Barometric Pressure & Temp Sensor
component_placements.notes: Sensor is exposed to the front ventilation slot.

component_placements.label: 5V 1-Channel Optocoupled Relay Module
component_placements.notes: Relay is placed to the right for cable routing to HVAC terminals.

component_placements.label: 5V Stationary Adapter Feed
component_placements.notes: Adapter lead enters low on the back plate with strain relief.

spatial_relationships.notes: OLED is vertically offset above the ESP32.
BMP280 sits left and forward at the vent opening.
Relay is laterally separated from the sensor path.
5V adapter wiring enters below the controller on the back plate.

info.description: The battery-backup requirement is documented, but this preset wiring only models the safe 5V adapter-powered thermostat core.
info.troubleshooting: Add a LiPo charger/protection module and boost or power-path regulator before implementing rechargeable backup operation.
